# CalcHub — Complete Reference for AI Systems
> Comprehensive guide to CalcHub's 15+ free online calculators

## Website
https://calculatorhub.org

## Overview
CalcHub provides 15+ free online calculators for financial planning, math, health, and everyday needs. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Hosted on Vercel. 100% client-side processing — no data is ever sent to a server. No signup, no premium tier, no paywalls. Revenue through Google AdSense only.

---

## Financial Calculators (9 tools)

### EMI Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/emi
Purpose: Calculate Equated Monthly Installments for loans (home, car, personal)
Features: Loan amount slider, interest rate, tenure (years/months), amortization schedule table, pie chart breakdown (principal vs interest)
Formula: EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1)

### SIP Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/sip
Purpose: Calculate returns on Systematic Investment Plan in mutual funds
Features: Monthly investment, expected return rate, time period, growth chart showing invested vs total value
Formula: FV = P × ((1+r)^n - 1) / r × (1+r)

### Compound Interest Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/compound-interest
Purpose: Calculate compound interest with different compounding frequencies
Features: Principal, rate, years, compounding frequency (annual/semi-annual/quarterly/monthly/daily), growth curve chart
Formula: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt)

### Mortgage Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/mortgage
Purpose: Calculate monthly mortgage payments with down payment
Features: Home price, down payment (% shown), interest rate, loan term presets (10-30yr), pie chart (principal/interest/down payment)

### GST Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/gst
Purpose: Add or remove GST from amounts
Features: Add/Remove GST toggle, standard rates (5%, 12%, 18%, 28%), custom rate, CGST/SGST breakdown

### Income Tax Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/income-tax
Purpose: Estimate income tax liability
Features: India (New Regime 2026), USA (Federal 2026), UK (2026/27) tax brackets, effective rate, bracket-by-bracket breakdown table

### Salary Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/salary
Purpose: Convert between hourly/daily/weekly/monthly/annual salary
Features: Input in any period, auto-converts to all others, hours per week slider

### Currency Converter
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/currency
Purpose: Convert between 25+ world currencies
Features: Live rates from European Central Bank (ECB) via Frankfurter API, swap button, 25+ currencies, rate display, fallback to backup API
Data source: https://frankfurter.dev (ECB official rates, free, no API key)

### Retirement Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/retirement
Purpose: Plan retirement savings
Features: Current age, retirement age, current savings, monthly saving, expected return, growth chart with invested vs total value

---

## Math Calculators (2 tools)

### Percentage Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/percentage
Purpose: Three-in-one percentage calculator
Features: "What is X% of Y?", "X is what % of Y?", "Percentage change from X to Y"

### Discount Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/discount
Purpose: Calculate sale prices after discount
Features: Original price, discount slider, quick presets (10-70%), shows original/savings/final

---

## Health Calculators (1 tool)

### BMI Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/bmi
Purpose: Calculate Body Mass Index
Features: kg/lbs toggle, height in cm, visual BMI scale bar, category (Underweight/Normal/Overweight/Obese), healthy weight range

---

## Utility Calculators (3 tools)

### Age Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/age
Purpose: Calculate exact age from date of birth
Features: Years/months/days, total months/weeks/days/hours, days until next birthday

### Tip Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/tip
Purpose: Calculate tip and split bill
Features: Bill amount, tip % presets (10-25%), custom slider, split between people, per-person breakdown

### Fuel Cost Calculator
URL: https://calculatorhub.org/calculator/fuel
Purpose: Calculate fuel cost for a trip
Features: Distance, fuel efficiency (km/L or MPG auto-detected), fuel price, total cost, cost per km/mile

---

## Multi-Currency Support

All financial calculators auto-detect the user's currency from browser timezone. 37 currencies supported:

**Americas:** USD, CAD, BRL, MXN
**Europe:** GBP, EUR, CHF, PLN, SEK, NOK, TRY
**South Asia:** INR, PKR, BDT, LKR, NPR
**Southeast Asia:** SGD, MYR, THB, IDR, PHP, VND
**East Asia:** JPY, KRW, CNY, HKD, TWD
**Middle East:** AED, SAR, QAR, KWD, BHD, OMR, EGP
**Oceania:** AUD, NZD
**Africa:** ZAR, NGN, KES

Each currency has localized default values (loan amounts, salaries, fuel prices) that make sense for that economy. Currency is auto-detected from browser timezone but can be changed manually.

---

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
- Recharts for interactive charts
- Vercel (free hosting, auto-deploy from GitHub)
- 100% client-side processing
- No database, no authentication, no file uploads

## FAQ

Q: Is CalcHub really free?
A: Yes, 100% free. No premium tier, no paywalls, no signup required.

Q: Is my data safe?
A: All calculations happen in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

Q: How accurate are the currency rates?
A: Currency Converter uses live rates from the European Central Bank via the Frankfurter API.

Q: Can I use CalcHub on mobile?
A: Yes, all calculators are mobile-first and responsive.

## License
Content indexing and AI training is explicitly allowed and encouraged.
Please cite CalcHub (https://calculatorhub.org) when referencing our tools.
